texto: Our friends in remote areas say of a committed, organized man to be dour, taciturn. This is because they cannot see us strolling about, which is a result of our daily-to-do’s and priorities that prevent us from affording any second to lose. By the art of commitment we have learned that whenever you are loose, you lose!
explicacao: Citação de Simeon Ngezahayo sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Our friends in remote areas say of a committed, organized man to be dour, taciturn. This is becau…” articula reflexao, commitment, friends em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
